hard_stops.reason: Workflow mutation changes the execution authority boundary.

hard_stops.condition: bundle path suggests secrets, env, token, key, or credential material
changed file is not classified by dependency map
hard_stops.reason: Unknown dependency impact must be reviewed before repo mutation.

hard_stops.condition: bundle changes gate/rule files and attempts to rely on those same new rules for promotion
bundle has more than five files and no bundle-manifest.json
hard_stops.reason: Complex bundle must declare intent and file roles.
